---
title: "Events"
page-layout: custom
title-block-style: none
toc: false
subtitle: "Upcoming and recurring events hosted by chen.ist"
description: "Find upcoming hackathons, workshops, conferences, meetups, and summer school programs hosted by chen.ist Academy."
include-in-header:
  text: |
    <style>.m { --c: #F5A623; }</style>
---

```{=html}
<div class="m">

<!-- HERO — full-screen dark with image -->
<div class="ev-hero">
  <div class="ev-hero-bg" style="background-image:url('/assets/images/stock/hackathon-team.webp');"></div>
  <div class="ev-hero-content">
    <div class="ev-hero-tag">chen.ist Academy</div>
    <h1>Events &amp; <br>Meetups</h1>
    <p>Hackathons, workshops, and community gatherings. Build something real with people who care.</p>
    <div style="display:flex; gap:1rem; justify-content:center; flex-wrap:wrap;">
      <a href="#upcoming" class="ev-btn">See what's next</a>
      <a href="https://alinmechenici.substack.com" target="_blank" class="ev-btn-ghost"><i class="bi bi-bell me-1"></i> Get notified</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- FEATURED EVENT — spotlight card -->
<div class="m-bg" style="padding:6rem 0;">
  <div class="container">
    <div style="max-width:900px; margin:0 auto;">
      <div class="blog-featured-card" style="border-color:rgba(245,166,35,0.15); background:rgba(245,166,35,0.03);">
        <div class="blog-featured-img">
          <img src="/assets/images/stock/hacker-screens.webp" alt="AI Ethics Hackathon" loading="lazy">
        </div>
        <div>
          <div class="blog-featured-tag" style="background:rgba(245,166,35,0.12); color:#F5A623;">Next Event</div>
          <div class="blog-featured-title">AI Ethics Hackathon</div>
          <div class="blog-featured-desc">A weekend hackathon on ethical AI — bias detection, responsible design, and AI that puts people first. 48 hours to build something meaningful.</div>
          <div class="blog-featured-meta">
            <span><i class="bi bi-calendar3"></i> March 5, 2026</span>
            <span><i class="bi bi-geo-alt"></i> Bucharest</span>
          </div>
          <div style="margin-top:1.25rem; display:flex; gap:0.75rem; flex-wrap:wrap;">
            <a href="/academy/events/pages/ai-ethics-hackathon.html" class="m-b" style="font-size:0.9rem; padding:0.6rem 1.5rem;">Register</a>
            <a href="/academy/events/ical/ai-ethics-hackathon-2025.ics" class="m-bo" style="font-size:0.9rem; padding:0.6rem 1.5rem;" download><i class="bi bi-calendar-plus me-1"></i> Add to calendar</a>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- UPCOMING — image cards -->
<div class="m-s" id="upcoming" style="padding:7rem 0;">
  <div class="container">
    <h2>Coming up</h2>
    <p class="sub">Spots are limited. Register early.</p>
    <div class="row g-4">
      <div class="col-md-4">
        <a href="/academy/events/pages/summer-school-2025.html" style="text-decoration:none;">
          <div class="pg-card">
            <img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/hackathon-team.webp" alt="Summer School">
            <div class="pg-card-body">
              <div style="font-size:0.75rem; color:rgba(255,255,255,0.5); margin-bottom:0.35rem;"><i class="bi bi-calendar3" style="color:#F5A623;"></i> Aug 1–15, 2026 &nbsp; <i class="bi bi-geo-alt" style="color:#F5A623;"></i> Craiova</div>
              <h3>Summer School 2026</h3>
              <p>Two weeks of cybersecurity, cloud, and AI with hands-on projects.</p>
            </div>
          </div>
        </a>
      </div>
      <div class="col-md-4">
        <a href="/academy/events/pages/makers-workshop.html" style="text-decoration:none;">
          <div class="pg-card">
            <img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/terminal-green.webp" alt="Makers Workshop">
            <div class="pg-card-body">
              <div style="font-size:0.75rem; color:rgba(255,255,255,0.5); margin-bottom:0.35rem;"><i class="bi bi-calendar3" style="color:#F5A623;"></i> Sep 15, 2026 &nbsp; <i class="bi bi-geo-alt" style="color:#F5A623;"></i> Bucharest</div>
              <h3>Makers Workshop</h3>
              <p>Hardware, DIY, and hands-on building with real components.</p>
            </div>
          </div>
        </a>
      </div>
      <div class="col-md-4">
        <a href="/academy/events/pages/space-hackathon.html" style="text-decoration:none;">
          <div class="pg-card">
            <img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/code-screen.webp" alt="SpaceApps Challenge">
            <div class="pg-card-body">
              <div style="font-size:0.75rem; color:rgba(255,255,255,0.5); margin-bottom:0.35rem;"><i class="bi bi-calendar3" style="color:#F5A623;"></i> Oct 2026 &nbsp; <i class="bi bi-geo-alt" style="color:#F5A623;"></i> Craiova</div>
              <h3>SpaceApps Challenge</h3>
              <p>NASA's global 48-hour hackathon. Solve real space challenges.</p>
            </div>
          </div>
        </a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- RECURRING — clean schedule -->
<div class="m-bg m-bg-stripes" style="padding:7rem 0;">
  <div class="container">
    <h2>Every month</h2>
    <p class="sub">Regular meetups you can count on.</p>
    <div style="max-width:750px; margin:0 auto;">

      <div class="up-item">
        <div style="flex-shrink:0; width:48px; height:48px; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; background:rgba(245,166,35,0.1); border-radius:12px;">
          <i class="bi bi-terminal" style="font-size:1.2rem; color:#F5A623;"></i>
        </div>
        <div style="flex-grow:1;">
          <h4><a href="https://clubul.computer/" target="_blank">Computer Club</a></h4>
          <div class="up-meta"><i class="bi bi-calendar3"></i> Last Thursday &nbsp; <i class="bi bi-geo-alt"></i> Craiova & Online</div>
        </div>
        <div class="up-badge up-badge-open">Ongoing</div>
      </div>

      <div class="up-item">
        <div style="flex-shrink:0; width:48px; height:48px; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; background:rgba(245,166,35,0.1); border-radius:12px;">
          <i class="bi bi-mic" style="font-size:1.2rem; color:#F5A623;"></i>
        </div>
        <div style="flex-grow:1;">
          <h4><a href="https://lu.ma/chenistacademy" target="_blank">Tech Talks</a></h4>
          <div class="up-meta"><i class="bi bi-calendar3"></i> First Tuesday &nbsp; <i class="bi bi-geo-alt"></i> Online</div>
        </div>
        <div class="up-badge up-badge-open">Ongoing</div>
      </div>

      <div class="up-item">
        <div style="flex-shrink:0; width:48px; height:48px; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; background:rgba(245,166,35,0.1); border-radius:12px;">
          <i class="bi bi-code-slash" style="font-size:1.2rem; color:#F5A623;"></i>
        </div>
        <div style="flex-grow:1;">
          <h4><a href="https://lu.ma/chenistacademy" target="_blank">Workshops</a></h4>
          <div class="up-meta"><i class="bi bi-calendar3"></i> See calendar &nbsp; <i class="bi bi-geo-alt"></i> Craiova & Online</div>
        </div>
        <div class="up-badge up-badge-open">Ongoing</div>
      </div>

    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- PAST EVENTS — timeline style -->
<div class="m-s" style="padding:7rem 0;">
  <div class="container">
    <h2>Past events</h2>
    <p class="sub">A track record of building together.</p>
    <div style="max-width:750px; margin:0 auto;">

      <div class="up-item">
        <div style="flex-shrink:0; width:48px; height:48px; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; background:rgba(129,189,74,0.08); border-radius:12px;">
          <i class="bi bi-shield-check" style="font-size:1.2rem; color:#81BD4A;"></i>
        </div>
        <div style="flex-grow:1;">
          <h4><a href="https://marca-ro.ca/2024/11/23/conferinta-igiena-digitala-la-copii-are-loc-la-craiova/" target="_blank">Cyber Hygiene for Kids</a></h4>
          <div class="up-meta"><i class="bi bi-calendar3"></i> November 2024 &nbsp; <i class="bi bi-geo-alt"></i> Craiova</div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="up-item">
        <div style="flex-shrink:0; width:48px; height:48px; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; background:rgba(129,189,74,0.08); border-radius:12px;">
          <i class="bi bi-flag" style="font-size:1.2rem; color:#81BD4A;"></i>
        </div>
        <div style="flex-grow:1;">
          <h4>Capture the Flag</h4>
          <div class="up-meta"><i class="bi bi-calendar3"></i> November 2023 &nbsp; <i class="bi bi-geo-alt"></i> Craiova</div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="up-item">
        <div style="flex-shrink:0; width:48px; height:48px; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; background:rgba(129,189,74,0.08); border-radius:12px;">
          <i class="bi bi-rocket-takeoff" style="font-size:1.2rem; color:#81BD4A;"></i>
        </div>
        <div style="flex-grow:1;">
          <h4><a href="https://alinmechenici.substack.com/p/sac" target="_blank">NASA SpaceApps &middot; 9 Editions</a></h4>
          <div class="up-meta"><i class="bi bi-calendar3"></i> 2016–2024 &nbsp; <i class="bi bi-geo-alt"></i> Sweden & Romania</div>
        </div>
      </div>

    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- STATS -->
<div class="m-bg" style="padding:5rem 0;">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="m-n">
      <div><div class="m-nn" style="color:#F5A623;">9+</div><div class="m-nl">Years of events</div></div>
      <div><div class="m-nn" style="color:#F5A623;">500+</div><div class="m-nl">Participants</div></div>
      <div><div class="m-nn" style="color:#F5A623;">3</div><div class="m-nl">Countries</div></div>
      <div><div class="m-nn" style="color:#F5A623;">20+</div><div class="m-nl">Events hosted</div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- CTA -->
<div class="m-cta">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="m-d"></div>
    <h2>Don't miss the next one</h2>
    <p>Get event updates or discuss hosting a private event for your team.</p>
    <div style="display:flex; gap:0.75rem; justify-content:center; flex-wrap:wrap;">
      <a href="https://alinmechenici.substack.com" target="_blank" class="m-b" style="background:#F5A623;"><i class="bi bi-bell me-2"></i>Subscribe to updates</a>
      <a href="/booking/" class="m-bo" style="border-color:#F5A623; color:#F5A623;">Book a call</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

</div>
```
